differential_diagnoses: Systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) with orbital involvement
next_steps: Initiate high-dose intravenous glucocorticoids for vision preservation
Perform serum testing for MOG-IgG and AQP4-IgG antibodies
Order comprehensive autoimmune panel (ANA, ENA, ANCA, dsDNA)
Perform biopsy of the orbital/optic nerve sheath tissue or skin lesion if diagnostic uncertainty persists
Consult ophthalmology, rheumatology, and potentially pathology for multispecialty management
